column1: **turbineSpecsFile:** |br| The path+filename to a turbine specifications file |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
**GADoutputForces:** |br| Flag to include GAD forces in the output: |br| 0=off; 1=on |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
**GADofflineForces:** |br| Flag to compute GAD forces in an offline mode: |br| 0=off; 1=on |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
**GADaxialInduction:** |br| Flag to compute axial induction factor: |br| 0=off (uses prescribed GADaxialIndVal) |br| 1=on |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
**GADaxialIndVal:** |br| Prescribed constant axial induction factor when GADaxialInduction==0 |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
**GADrefSwitch:** |br| Switch to use reference windspeed: |br| 0=off; 1=on |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
**GADrefU:** |br| Prescribed constant reference hub-height windspeed |br| *C-M if GADSelector > 0 and* |br| *GADrefSwitch == 1*
**GADrefSampleWindow:** |br| Sample duration (in seconds) over which to average per-timestep values (filtering out highest frequencies) |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
**GADrefSeriesLength:** |br| Number of sampling windows over which to average again for reference velocity magnitude and direction |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
**GADForcingSwitch:** |br| Switch to use the GADrefU-based or local windspeed in computing GAD forces: |br| 0=local |br| 1=ref |br| *C-O if GADSelector > 0*
